parametrized_description: The summer camp uses N different types of beakers. Each beaker type i consumes T[i] units of flour and V[i] units of special liquid to produce X[i] units of slime and C[i] units of waste. The camp has D units of flour and Z units of special liquid available. The total waste produced must not exceed E. The goal is to determine how many beakers of each type to use to maximize the total amount of slime produced.

C.description: The quantity of waste generated by each individual beaker

E.description: The highest quantity of waste permitted

X.description: Quantity of slime generated by every container

T.description: Quantity of flour utilized for each individual beaker

D.description: Quantity of flour that is accessible

V.description: Quantity of the specialized liquid utilized by individual beakers.

Z.description: Quantity of unique fluid that can be used

n.description: The quantity of flour utilized by beaker i

constraints.description: The combined quantity of unique liquid utilized by each beaker does not surpass Z.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(V[i] * n[i] for i in range(N)) <= Z)

objective.description: The highest possible quantity of slime generated by each beaker is reached.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(quicksum(X[i] * n[i] for i in range(N)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
